text:
Day 545: Update on my World Cup positions.

🇫🇷 France: +104%
🇲🇦 Morocco: -10%

Unrealized profit: +$4,636

Now that the group stage is over, I'm sticking to my original plan and taking profits.

I'll keep $1,000 invested in France for some exposure, while realizing around $3,636 in profit.

France still has, in my opinion, the strongest squad in the tournament, but knockout football is brutal. It only takes one bad game to get eliminated.

Looks like France was indeed massively undervalued at 10.9c, and I'm happy I managed to catch the move and share it with you guys.

Won another competition most people didn’t even know about.

Huge shoutout to @BullpenFi & @pear_protocol https://t.co/60vBpdhpVJ

Day 544: $POLY airdrop will easily be one of the biggest airdrops ever.

Here are the current stats you need to be TOP 1% out of ~2.96M users:

> 3.5K PnL
> 600K+ volume
> 13$ in LP rewards

Honestly, these criteria are still very achievable if you actually put in some effort.

How many of these can you currently tick off?

Day 543: Putting my money on Ronaldo not crying at the World Cup.

I think a lot of people haven't properly read the resolution rules and are overestimating the odds of this happening.

The market is pricing it around 68%, while I think the true odds are closer to 35%.

The crying must be clearly visible on the field or on the bench.

For example, when Portugal got eliminated by Morocco in 2022, Ronaldo only started crying in the players' tunnel. Under these rules, that would have resolved to NO.

At 3.12x odds, buying NO feels like a great R/R

Day 542: @Proprxyz trading tournament just went live.

Propr is a prop trading platform built on top of Hyperliquid.

They are distributing $1,000,000 in funded accounts to the 58 traders with the highest ROI over the next 7 days.

> Completely free to participate
> Everyone starts with a $50K demo account
> Trade crypto, equities, commodities and more

I highly recommend giving this a shot.

Top performers can receive funded accounts worth up to $100K, making this one of the best free trading competitions I’ve seen in a while.

Propr has already generated $960K in revenue in its first two months live and currently has around 2,200 paying users.

They’ve allocated 32.5% of the supply to users and the community, making it one of the most interesting airdrops I’m keeping an eye on.

Day 541: Will be heavily pushing spot volume this week on @extendedapp .

Extended quietly introduced spot trading today.

They've already confirmed that all activity on Extended earns points, so I expect spot trading to receive boosted rewards during the first few weeks.

(Just like Variational boosted points for RWA pairs.)

The best part is that spot trading has 0% fees on limit orders, making it a great opportunity to generate volume at virtually no cost.

Extended will very likely TGE within the next 2 months.
👉https://t.co/LotlJ7nhPx

Day 540: My honest review of the Plasma Card (Core Tier).

The Plasma Card launched earlier this week and there are only 3 days left to get the Core Tier for free, which normally costs $120/year or requires staking 20,000 XPL.

If you deposit at least $100, you can activate Core for free.

> 3% cashback
> $100 credit for ChatGPT Go
> 4.13% APY vault with no lockup

Overall rating: 8.2/10

Fast deposits, fast KYC procedure, clean UI and the ChatGPT credit alone covers roughly 10 months of my subscription. Right now I prefer it over RedotPay.

The only downside is that they seem to charge around 2% in transaction fees, so the real cashback is closer to 1%.

Day 539: I spent $3.29 in fees for a chance to win $1,000.

@nansen_ai is distributing $1,000,000 in rewards through a 10-week campaign, with $100K raffled every monday.

Each week there are 100 winning tickets, and every winning ticket pays $1,000.

Here's the strategy I'm using:
> deposit $100 into Nansen
> generate $10K in perp volume

Personally, I'd recommend trading $SPCX with limit orders since fees are extremely low.

I'm Ice tier on Nansen, so I only paid $3.29 in fees to generate the required $10K volume.

Nansen only generated around $11.5K in fees over the last 7 days, which is far less than the $100K they're giving away this Monday.

Spend 5 minutes, pay a few dollars in fees, and you might wake up with an extra $1,000 in a couple of days.

Use this link for a 10% trading fee discount:
👉https://t.co/iLq2mkJtES

Day 538: Another trading competition worth participating in.

@BullpenFi is running a $25K trading competition (which can scale up to $100K) based on PnL over a 4-week period.

> Starting balance: $1,000
> Link your X account
> Trade any pair on Hyperliquid

Honestly seems very +EV to participate.

The winner receives 50% of the prize pool, and if you manage to finish near the top you'll probably get a decent amount of free marketing for your X account as well. 

Competition details: https://t.co/HUWONOrZxZ

Day 536: Instead of betting on World Cup outcomes where you'll probably lose money...

Focus on finding boosted odds.

Sportsbooks regularly offer them to attract users, and sometimes the value is so good that you can hedge the bet elsewhere for a guaranteed profit.

For example, my local sportsbook is currently offering 2.00x odds on France to score a goal.

The true odds are closer to 1.13x (max €50 stake).

Instead of gambling, you can:
>Bet €50 on France to score at the sportsbook
>Buy €6.68 of "France Under 0.5 Goals" on Polymarket

Option a) If France scores, you profit €43.32.
Option b) If France doesn't score, you break even.

This is the type of stuff I spend my time looking for during the World Cup.

Day 535: Week 2 of @bulktrade results are out

> 1 point is currently worth $34 in deposits
> 1 point is worth 175$ in referral deposits

TVL is currently $31M and I received 2349 points this week. I'm pretty convinced this will remain the best stablefarm for the next 4 weeks. 

My expected APR at this moment is around 350%.

Day 534: $100K trading competition on Nado.

For people farming perp DEXes, this is a great way to farm points while also taking a shot at some decent rewards.

> $100 minimum balance
>250K volume required during competition
>Runs from June 15 until June 22

The prize pool is $100K with $22.5K for the first place.
A $100 minimum balance is accessible to almost everyone, making it a pretty +EV opportunity to take a shot at a moonbag.

Even if you don't place highly, you'll still be farming Nado points at the same time.

Day 532: Another free chance to win up to $10,000.

@Hyperbeat is giving away $50K in rewards through their free World Cup fantasy game.

> Build a 15-player squad  
> Maximum 3 players from the same nation 
> Select a captain for double points

The top 2,000 finishers will split the prize pool.
1st place: $10,000 2nd place: $6,000 3rd place: $4,000

It takes about 2 minutes to enter and even the person finishing 2000th still receives $25.

Only 475 people have signed up so far and the World Cup starts tomorrow.

Sign up here: https://t.co/CCUk5G37N9

Day 530: my top 5 airdrop farms right now are literally Polymarket & 4 perp DEXes.

Don’t overcomplicate it. https://t.co/sIODxjnfLy

Day 529: Urgent reminder to select your wallet for the $MEGA airdrop.

You have until June 10th to choose the wallet that will receive your rewards.

If you don't complete this step, your rewards will be forfeited and you'll receive nothing.

> Go to https://t.co/eyldWbLtkU
> Select your receiving wallet
> Confirm the choice

The whole process takes less than 30 seconds.

Make sure to share this with your friends as well because it's a very easy thing to overlook.

Day 528: @bulktrade is my highest-conviction airdrop farm for the next 4–6 weeks.

> By far the best stable farm right now
> Received 711 points from a $10K deposit
> 30% airdrop confirmed

According to my calculations, Week 1 points translates to roughly 739% APR if Bulk launches at a $200M FDV.

Once mainnet goes live, you'll need millions in trading volume to even get close to get points at the same rate as these first few weeks.

The best points in every linear airdrop system are usually earned early.

 Use code 'DIDI' for the maximum Aura boost 😉

Day 527: @bulktrade seems like one of the best stable farms right now.

Bulktrade currently has around $20M in pre-deposits, which puts the projected APR at roughly 231% based on current emissions.

I deposited a few days ago when TVL was only $1.5M because I knew being early would be heavily +EV.

The best points in any linear airdrop system are usually farmed in the first weeks when competition is low.

If you haven’t deposited yet, it’s still relatively early and funds can be withdrawn at any time if needed.

Use code DIDI for the maximum Aura boost 😉

Day 526: World Cup starts in 7 days.

I bought YES shares on Belgium at 2c because I think they're undervalued.

I don't expect them to win the World Cup at all, but they have one of the easier group stages and I give them a decent chance to reach the quarter finals.

If they manage to get that far, I think the odds should reprice closer to 6c, which would be a 3x from my entry.

The plan is simple: monitor every game after the group stage and decide whether to keep holding or start taking profits depending on the bracket and who they might face next.

Won a PNL competition last week and received $20k

S/o to @tradeparagon & @BullpenFi https://t.co/Z0KZWlOmyi
